title: Ultra Crispy Turkish Chicken Casserole
description: A malty, flaky, post-workout Turkish casserole that is double-fried for ultimate crispness and cooked in a ramekin for a perfect serving.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt, cumin, paprika and lemon juice for 10 minutes.
Pat the seasoned chicken dry with paper towels to remove moisture.
Dust the chicken lightly with malted milk powder and roll it in breadcrumbs until fully coated.
Heat 2 tbsp of olive oil in a skillet over medium heat and fry the chicken until golden brown, about 4 minutes per side.
Remove the chicken and let it rest on paper towels to drain excess oil.
Reheat the skillet and fry the rested chicken again for 2 minutes per side to achieve a double-crispy finish.
Transfer the double-fried chicken into a preheated ramekin and bake at 180°C for 8 minutes to finish cooking.
Serve hot with a side of roasted vegetables or a simple green salad.
